_comment: Stryker config scoped to kernel (deterministic state-machine surface — highest mutation-test signal). Compiler scope deferred to a follow-up bead: compiler talks to Claude through ClaudeClient which is mocked in tests, so mutation score there reflects mock-coverage not real behavior. See bead 0wy.1 closing notes + tests/TESTING.md.
_ignoreStatic_note: Static mutants (string constants, etc.) are 10% of mutants but 60% of runtime in this codebase. CI feasibility requires ignoring them. They have low kill-signal anyway — surviving a static mutant only means no test ran the file at all.
_vitest_dir_note: Stryker invokes vitest at the package root (packages/kernel) not the monorepo root — vitest configs use cwd-relative include patterns (src/**/*.test.ts). The explicit plugins entry is required because pnpm's symlink layout breaks Stryker's default '@stryker-mutator/*' plugin glob.
_break_note: Baseline measured 2026-05-25: 60.25% total mutation kill rate (1800 killed of 2989 mutants, 11:36 wall-clock, ignoreStatic=true). Floor = baseline - 5 = 55. PRs that drop below this fail the mutation-test job. Re-baseline + bump floor any time the kernel test suite materially improves. See tests/TESTING.md.
